title: Ultimate FPS
description: When using this modpack, you will get a lot more FPS than you deserve.
body:
## **Pack Overview**

When using this modpack, you can have a playable minecraft experience. If you want a better vanilla experince, then this is the pack for you. If you want a comparison between vanilla, and Ultimate FPS, then here it is ⬇️


![Comparison](https://i.imgur.com/YYSDTQm.png)




## **How To Install**
To install **Ultimate FPS**, you're going to need the [**Modrinth App**](https://modrinth.com/app). So just click on the link, and then click on the "Download Modrinth App" button. It will download an installer, just run the installer and you have successfully installed the **Modrinth App**. Now, open the app, and click on the compass (discover content) button on the left side. Now search up "**Ultimate FPS**", and click on the install button on the right side. Finaly click on the Library tab (the books), hover over **Ultimate FPS**, then click on the green play button. Congratulations you have successfully installed Ultimate FPS!

> **DISCLAMER** _I did not make any of these mods, so huge thanks to the creators._

## [**Mods list**](https://modrinth.com/modpack/ultimate-frames-per-second/version/1.1)
